title: osteospermum ecklonis
intro: Osteospermum ecklonis, also known as the Blue Eyed Daisy, is a flowering plant native to South Africa, belonging to the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Osteospermum ecklonis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Osteospermum ecklonis include infusions, decoctions, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
